svg.title: External pub.dev dependencies wrapped by each workspace package
svg.desc: Each local package encapsulates a set of third-party pub.dev libraries. For example network wraps dio and retrofit, app_platform wraps camera, image_picker and notifications, theme wraps flex_color_scheme and flutter_bloc, and architecture has no dependencies.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What domain primitives live in the architecture package?')
sendPrompt('How does the config package use firebase_remote_config?')
sendPrompt('What does the storage package provide?')
sendPrompt('List all packages in the app_ui package and the widgets they power')
sendPrompt('How does the analytics package wrap firebase_analytics?')
sendPrompt('How does the network package set up Dio and Retrofit?')
sendPrompt('How does the theme package manage theme state?')
sendPrompt('List all packages in app_platform and the services they back')
sendPrompt('What test helpers does the test_utils package provide?')
